description: Manages roleplay mode: loads characters and scenes for immersive conversations.

commands.list_characters: Lists all characters available for roleplaying.
commands.list_scenes: Lists all scenes available for roleplaying.
commands.load_character: Loads a character by name to interpret their role.
commands.load_scene: Loads a specific setting or scene for roleplaying.
commands.reset_roleplay: Complete reset of active characters and scenes.
commands.unload_character: Deactivates the current character and returns to the normal personality.
commands.unload_scene: Removes the current scene or setting.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__list_characters
function.description: Lists all characters available for roleplaying.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__list_scenes
function.description: Lists all scenes available for roleplaying.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__load_character
function.description: Loads a character by name to interpret their role.

name.description: The exact name of the character to load.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__load_scene
function.description: Loads a specific setting or scene for roleplaying.

name.description: The name of the scene to load.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__reset_roleplay
function.description: Complete reset of active characters and scenes.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__unload_character
function.description: Deactivates the current character and returns to the normal personality.

function.name: ROLEPLAY__unload_scene
function.description: Removes the current scene or setting.
